tasks.name: Offboarding — Exit Settlement UI & Right-Drawer
tasks.body: Exit settlement frontend with right-side slide-in drawer UX
tasks.summary:
- Built the exit settlement frontend (RTK Query + inline settlement section)
- Created a reusable right-side slide-in drawer (renders above the navbar) for the Offboarding detail
- Moved settlement to an inline section inside the detail drawer (totals + month-by-month + refresh/finalize)
- Replaced stacked centered modals with the drawer pattern

tasks.name: Offboarding — Experience Letter (HTML to PDF)
tasks.body: Experience letter backend foundation + PDF generation + frontend
tasks.summary:
- Added the shared letter-generation foundation: gender-aware pronoun resolver, company/signatory config, HTML to PDF rendering (openhtmltopdf)
- Implemented the experience letter service with tenure calculation and gender-aware wording
- Verified a real gender-aware PDF end-to-end (letterhead, dates, pronouns, tenure)
- Built the frontend Documents section to generate/view the letter

tasks.name: Offboarding — Relieving Letter + Settlement Gate
tasks.body: Relieving letter backend + finalized-settlement gate + frontend
tasks.summary:
- Implemented the relieving letter reusing the shared letter foundation
- Gated relieving letter generation on the exit settlement being finalized (configurable)
- Verified the gate blocks correctly and the PDF renders with gender-aware wording
- Extended the frontend to list and generate both experience and relieving letters

tasks.name: Offboarding — Letter Release Flow & Employee Download
tasks.body: Generate vs release separation + ownership-scoped employee download
tasks.summary:
- Added a release flow: generating a letter no longer exposes it; HR must explicitly Release to the employee (sets released flag, notifies)
- Built ownership-scoped employee download endpoints so employees fetch only their own released letters
- Added the HR Release button + Released/Draft badges and an employee Documents view on My Resignation
- Verified the full flow: hidden before release, downloadable after

tasks.name: Offboarding — Documents UI Redesign & Download Fix
tasks.body: Letter-card UI for the documents section + download error handling
tasks.summary:
- Redesigned the documents section as per-letter cards (icon + title + status + footer action bar) to fix the cramped 3-button layout
- Fixed the employee download (storage path mismatch) and hardened it to return a clean 404 when a file is missing
- Surfaced download errors on the employee side instead of failing silently

tasks.name: Offboarding — Merge dev & Renumber Migrations
tasks.body: Merged origin/dev into feat/offboarding; resolved migration version collisions
tasks.summary:
- Merged the latest origin/dev into feat/offboarding in both repos (clean, no conflicts)
- Detected Flyway version collisions (dev advanced to V102); renumbered offboarding migrations to V103-V106
- Recompiled the merged backend (BUILD SUCCESS) and re-ran frontend typecheck (no new errors)
- Branch is now up to date with dev and collision-free
